title: Ice cream
excerpt: I made this ice cream for Amanda Strydom and I think if she could have packed some up and taken it on the plane, she would have!
html: I made this ice cream for Amanda Strydom and I think if she could have packed some up and taken it on the plane, she would have!

items: 1 packet Whispers or any small chocolate balls

steps: Line a loaf tin with cling wrap.
Soften the ice cream a little and mix half the biscuits, half the Flake chocolates and half the chocolate balls into the ice cream.
Pour it into the loaf tin.
Cover with cling wrap and freeze.
Turn it out of the loaf tin and decorate with the remaining Flake chocolates, chocolate balls and pretty flowers.
Make the chocolate sauce by melting the slab of chocolate together with the cream in the microwave.
